title: Recruiting Coordinator
description: Support JLL's talent acquisition team as a Recruiting Coordinator, helping us attract and hire top talent.
responsibilities: Screen resumes and coordinate candidate interviews
Manage recruiting workflows and candidate pipelines
Prepare offer letters and coordinate onboarding
Source candidates and manage job postings
Support recruiters with scheduling and administrative tasks

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
